event: The Piazzetta and the Doge's Palace
description: A watercolor depicting the Piazzetta in Venice with the ornate Gothic facade of the Doge's Palace dominating the right side. The building features rows of pointed arches, delicate tracery, and a colonnade at ground level. At left, another ornate building with balconies and columns rises beside it. Figures are gathered in dark clusters at the base of the buildings. The scene is rendered in loose washes of warm stone tones, grey, and blue, with bright highlights suggesting Mediterranean sunlight on the marble surfaces.

_meta.title: The Piazzetta and the Doge's Palace
